coding_notes: Replicate 2 verdicts. Anthropic dropped the GI-stability test it had in r1 (C4.4 ignore vs r1 affirm). OpenAI moved from promoter-mapping (r1 disagree) to cell-free expression (r2 affirm) on C4.3.

claims.claim_text: Proposed Experiment #1 is an in-silico cassette/sequence audit (SignalP + codon + structure prediction).

deepseek.value_quoted: Exp 1: in-silico manufacturability audit (SignalP, AlphaFold, codon, splice scan)

gemini.value_quoted: Exp 1: In Silico Signal Peptide Functionality Assessment

anthropic.value_quoted: Exp 1: SignalP + PTS1 motif scan + secretion-pathway audit

claims.claim_text: Vendor specifically flags the native A. flavus uricase PTS1 (peroxisomal targeting signal) as a conflict with the secretion path. (DOMINANT-RISK INSIGHT).

deepseek.value_quoted: Mentions intracellular/peroxisomal native context in assumptions but does NOT foreground PTS1 as kill criterion in Exp 1

gemini.value_quoted: Did not flag PTS1; focused on signal-peptide cleavage prediction only

openai.value_quoted: Mentions 'normally cytosolic/peroxisomal uricase motifs' as one item among many; not foregrounded as kill

anthropic.value_quoted: EXPLICITLY flags PTS1 SKL/AKL/SRL as kill criterion: 'If C-terminal PTS1 present -> kill this exact cassette design'

claims.claim_text: Includes a wet-lab experiment that produces and assays the enzyme protein in a non-host system (E. coli or cell-free).

deepseek.value_quoted: Exp 2: PURExpress cell-free expression of mature uricase

openai.value_quoted: Exp 3: cell-free or microscale heterologous mature uricase expression

anthropic.value_quoted: Exp 3: Pichia/S. cerevisiae surrogate-host secretion test

claims.claim_text: Includes a GI-tract stability / simulated-fluid stress test.

deepseek.value_quoted: Did not include GI/SGF/SIF test in this round

gemini.value_quoted: Exp 3 is transient protoplast secretion; no GI stress test

openai.value_quoted: Exp 2 is conditioned-medium spike-in stability, not GI

anthropic.value_quoted: Dropped GI stability test relative to r1; r2 covers in-silico + codon + Pichia surrogate

claims.claim_text: Experiment is in the right cost class (in-silico = $0; low wet-lab < $500; mid $500-5000).
Names a kill criterion (specific threshold below which the design is abandoned).

deepseek.value_quoted: Kill if SignalP <0.5, pLDDT <70, cell-free activity <5% control

gemini.value_quoted: Kill if multiple experiments fail; pivot to new strategy

openai.value_quoted: Kill if mature secreted form predicted intrinsically incompatible with activity

anthropic.value_quoted: Kill if PTS1 present; kill if no activity anywhere in Exp 3
